meaning: lever; pry bar; crowbar; financial leverage
sentence: 用杠杆可以轻松撬开盖子。
pinyin: Yòng gànggǎn kěyǐ qīngsōng qiàokāi gàizi.
english: You can easily pry off the lid using a lever.

sentence: 你需要激活账号才能登录。
pinyin: Nǐ xūyào jīhuó zhànghào cái néng dēnglù.
english: You need to activate your account before you can log in.

sentence: 她买了一件粉红色的外套。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī jiàn fěnhóngsè de wàitào.

meaning: 1. single; 2. alone; 3. individually; 4. an odd one
sentence: 这些苹果也可以单个出售。
pinyin: Zhèxiē píngguǒ yě kěyǐ dāngè chūshòu.
english: These apples can also be sold individually.

sentence: 这个零件是用铝合金做的。
pinyin: Zhège língjiàn shì yòng lǚ héjīn zuò de.
english: This part is made of aluminum alloy.
